npcs.name: Syd Barret
dialogue: Hello there!

npcs.name: Mick Jagger
dialogue: Hello there!

npcs.name: Mother Ysara
dialogue: Enter freely, traveler. Aethis welcomes all.
The faithful of Aethis know no fear.
Healing and blessings are offered here.
Go with Aethis's grace.

npcs.name: Bram
dialogue: Ah, customers! Welcome to Bram's Forge.
You won't find better quality anywhere else.
Every item here has been tested in the field.
Gold well spent is gold well earned!

npcs.name: Roslyn
dialogue: Come in, come in! The Copper Kettle is the warmest spot in town.
Hot stew and a soft bed -- what more could you want?
Travelers bring all sorts of stories through here.
Stay as long as you like!

npcs.name: Elder Morath
dialogue: Welcome, travelers. I am the keeper of this town's history.
These lands were peaceful once, before the darkness came.
Be wary of the wilds -- not all creatures are friendly.
May fortune smile upon your journey.

npcs.name: Dorin
dialogue: Beautiful day, isn't it?
Watch out for wolves in the forest.

npcs.name: Tomas
dialogue: Have you heard about the old ruins?
They say treasure lies within.

npcs.name: Sven
dialogue: The road north has been dangerous lately.
Stick to the main paths.
